botcomponent.description: Calculate the exact prorated refund when a customer cancels a BlastPass membership for the BlastBox Omega console. Use after the Store Policy Agent confirms a prorated refund is allowed for the member's tier and the Membership MCP has returned the membership details (months remaining, annual price, fees). The skill writes and runs a short Python snippet to compute the precise refund and shows a line-by-line breakdown.
botcomponent.name: prorated-refund-calculator
